category_sources: source_facts.description says kubergrunt fills gaps between Terraform, Helm, and Kubectl; official GitHub repository describes it as a standalone Go binary with commands for that purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubergrunt; official GitHub repository uses kubergrunt as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents kubergrunt commands and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/gruntwork-io/kubergrunt, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions Terraform, Helm, and Kubectl; official README documents Kubernetes and EKS operational commands.
